paper_title: Employee Well-being and Workplace Attendance: A Longitudinal Study
source: synthetic trap paper authored for Citare stress test on 2026-04-23
trap_description: Method measures ONLY life satisfaction (SWLS). Discussion generalizes to 'well-being programs' (emotional, psychological, social). Faithful extractor must record DV as life_satisfaction (NOT wellbeing) and should distinguish measured-dv from Discussion-framed construct.

must_catch_claims.description: CRITICAL TRAP: IV must be life_satisfaction / SWLS, NOT 'well-being'. The paper only measured SWLS, a single construct.
